provenance.seed_scheme: SeedSequence([BANK_SALT, u32(cell::sched), u32(scene), rep]).spawn(5); salts 700/720 disjoint from calibration 710
provenance.interval_construction: DLGI=calibrated Neyman (frozen table); pilot=parametric bootstrap; oracle=Whittle profile-LR

reciprocity.predicted_ordering: full-record Fisher info ~schedule-invariant; paired predicted best for BOTH ledgers at the estimator level; no forced scene-vs-medium trade

ledger_audit.note: pilot-free & plain-linear consume the byte-identical record; pilot equal exposures/photons; medium ledger = zero-cost post-processing (C7)
